grep_matches.text: "currentTask": "Implementing Audit codeguardian-mock disposition (decommission vs repair) PRD",

"Audit script `scripts/audit/codeguardian-mock-disposition.mjs` runs grep across *.js,*.ts,*.mjs,*.cjs,*.json,*.yml,*.yaml,*.md for 'codeguardian-mock' and 'codeguardian_mock'; parses docker-compose*.yml for service definitions; parses root package.json workspaces array; scans .github/workflows/*.yml for path references; emits machine-readable JSON to docs/audits/sd-leo-infra-codeguardian-mock-audit-001/audit-output.json plus human-readable summary at AUDIT.md.",

"Disposition decision document at docs/audits/sd-leo-infra-codeguardian-mock-audit-001/DECISION.md declares EITHER 'Option A (decommission)' OR 'Option B (repair)' with citations to specific lines of audit-output.json.",

"If chosen, atomic PR removes (a) services/codeguardian-mock/ recursively, (b) line of vitest.config.js containing '**/services/codeguardian-mock/**', (c) any docker-compose service block referencing codeguardian-mock, (d) any package.json workspaces entry, (e) any CI workflow path reference.",
"Post-merge `grep -r 'codeguardian-mock' --include=*.{json,yml,yaml,js,ts,mjs,cjs} .` returns zero matches outside the audit doc directory."

"If chosen, atomic PR (a) fixes failing tests inside services/codeguardian-mock/tests/ so they pass under vitest, (b) removes the '**/services/codeguardian-mock/**' exclusion from vitest.config.js, (c) preserves the service docker-compose/workspace registration if those exist.",
"`npx vitest run services/codeguardian-mock/tests/` exits 0 with at least one test executed (not all skipped)."
"Diff vitest.config.js shows net -1 exclusion entry (the codeguardian-mock line removed); no new entries in same PR. Pre-commit/CI guard could be added but is out of scope for this SD."
"Disposition=B → tests fixed → exclusion removed → vitest run passes → CI green. Expected: services/codeguardian-mock/tests/ tests visible in test-coverage report."
"Audit finds codeguardian-mock referenced in docker-compose.dev.yml. DECISION.md must explicitly call out the docker reference and either remove it (Option A) or document why it stays (Option B)."
"Audit finds package.json workspaces array includes 'services/codeguardian-mock'. Disposition execution must update workspaces array atomically."

"Audit's dynamic_require_matches is non-empty (e.g., require('services/codeguardian-mock/something') appears somewhere). DECISION.md must NOT auto-recommend Option A — escalate to LEAD for review (this is the abandoned-status drift case)."
"package.json workspaces array and/or package-lock.json may reference @ehg/codeguardian-mock; deleting the dir without updating these causes `npm install` errors.",

"codeguardian-mock may be referenced by docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.dev.yml, or docker-compose.test.yml. Removing the build dir without cleaning compose files leaves dangling service definitions that fail `docker-compose up`.",
".github/workflows/*.yml may reference services/codeguardian-mock paths in path-filters or build steps. Removing the dir without cleaning workflows breaks unrelated CI runs.",
"require('services/codeguardian-mock/...') or import('services/codeguardian-mock/...') at runtime would not show up in static grep for module specifier strings unless we grep the literal substring.",
"Audit script checks `git log --since=2026-04-26 services/codeguardian-mock/` for new commits + greps for any new external refs. If new activity found, escalate to LEAD before deletion."
"Audit script identifies the exclusion entry by content (regex match on '**/services/codeguardian-mock/**') not by line number; disposition execution edits by content."
"If Option A: post-merge `grep -r 'codeguardian-mock' --include=*.{json,yml,yaml,js,ts,mjs,cjs} .` returns zero matches outside the audit doc directory."
"If Option B: `npx vitest run services/codeguardian-mock/tests/` exits 0 with at least one test executed (not all skipped)."
change: "Disposition PR removes (Option A) or repairs (Option B) the codeguardian-mock test-suite source so test-coverage workflow no longer hits the abandoned-scaffolding skip path."
change: "After Option A, `npx vitest run` no longer encounters the codeguardian-mock exclusion comment; after Option B, the test directory becomes a normal participant in the vitest run."
failure_mode: "Only relevant if codeguardian-mock is registered as a workspace; audit script detects this."
failure_mode: "Only relevant if a service block references codeguardian-mock; audit script detects this."
failure_mode: "Only relevant if any workflow references services/codeguardian-mock paths; audit script detects this."
default: "docs/audits/sd-leo-infra-codeguardian-mock-audit-001/"
"Per-SD git revert; Option A revert restores services/codeguardian-mock/ tree; Option B revert re-adds exclusion to vitest.config.js"

"Audit whether services/codeguardian-mock/ should be decommissioned (Option A, ~95% likely per Explore-agent codebase scan: zero imports outside the directory, vitest excludes since 2026-04-26 commit 7d0b8a8ff9 'abandoned scaffolding', multiple SD-CODEGUARDIAN-* sibling PRs closed-as-superseded) or repaired (Option B). " +

"SD-LEO-INFRA-TEST-COVERAGE-HYGIENE-001 (parent) FR-3 surfaced the codeguardian-mock vitest exclusion as a hygiene defect: scaffolding kept on disk, excluded from CI, signaling 'we'll come back to this' that never happens. " +

"EHG_Engineer Vite-based monorepo. services/codeguardian-mock/ is a directory of indeterminate size (audit step quantifies). Excluded from vitest at vitest.config.js:44 since 2026-04-26 via commit 7d0b8a8ff9 with comment 'abandoned scaffolding'. " +
"Component A: scripts/audit/codeguardian-mock-disposition.mjs (one-shot Node ES module, ~50 LOC, stdlib only).\n" +
"Component B: docs/audits/sd-leo-infra-codeguardian-mock-audit-001/AUDIT.md (human-readable, generated).\n" +
"Component C: docs/audits/sd-leo-infra-codeguardian-mock-audit-001/audit-output.json (machine-readable, generated).\n" +
"Component D: docs/audits/sd-leo-infra-codeguardian-mock-audit-001/DECISION.md (LEAD/EXEC authored after audit runs, parseable by grep).\n" +
"services/codeguardian-mock/ has zero imports outside the directory (Explore-agent finding to be confirmed by FR-1 audit).",
"vitest.config.js exclusion line content matches regex '\\*\\*\\/services\\/codeguardian-mock\\/\\*\\*' (verified by audit script before execution).",
